tagline: Your Backyard Oasis — You Dream It, We Make It Happen

hero.headline: Award-Winning Pools Built to Last
hero.subheadline: For over 16 years, EverClear Pools & Spas has helped Paterson-area families turn backyards into personal retreats. From custom gunite construction to weekly maintenance, we stand behind every project we touch.

services.headline: Everything Your Pool Needs — Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From the first shovel of dirt to every weekly cleaning visit, EverClear handles it all so you can focus on making memories.

cards.title: Gunite Pool Construction
cards.description: Custom-designed gunite pools that last a lifetime. We handle every detail from 3D rendering to the final tile, backed by extended warranties.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Breathe new life into your existing pool with a complete renovation — updated surfaces, modern tile, improved layouts, and energy-efficient equipment.

cards.title: Pool Resurfacing & Plastering
cards.description: Worn surface dragging down your pool's look? Our expert replastering restores that smooth, like-new finish you fell in love with.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Crystal-clear water every week without lifting a finger. Our valet service covers chemicals, cleaning, and equipment checks all season.

cards.title: Pool Openings & Closings
cards.description: Seasonal care done right — we safely open your pool for summer and properly winterize it to protect your investment through the cold months.

cards.title: Spa & Hot Tub Installation
cards.description: Extend your relaxation with a professionally installed spa or hot tub, perfectly integrated into your existing outdoor living space.

how_it_works.headline: Your Dream Pool in 3 Simple Steps

steps.title: Free Consultation & Design
steps.description: We visit your property, discuss your vision, and create a custom 3D design that fits your space, lifestyle, and budget.

steps.title: Expert Construction
steps.description: Our certified crew brings your design to life with industry-leading techniques, clear communication at every stage, and zero surprises.

steps.title: Enjoy & Maintain
steps.description: Dive into your new backyard oasis. We offer ongoing weekly maintenance so your pool stays pristine for years to come.

about.label: About EverClear Pools & Spas
about.headline: 16 Years of Helping NJ Families Make Memories
about.description: Led by owner Jason Werner, EverClear Pools & Spas has grown from a small Paterson-based operation into one of Northern New Jersey's most decorated pool contractors. We build custom gunite and vinyl pools, handle remodeling and resurfacing, and provide the kind of weekly maintenance that keeps your water sparkling and your equipment humming. Our mission is simple: help families make memories that last a lifetime through quality craftsmanship and honest, ongoing relationships.
about.badge: Top 3 Pool Contractor in Passaic County

features.title: CPO Certified & OSHA Trained
features.description: Every technician holds professional pool operator certification and OSHA 10/30 hour safety training credentials.

features.title: Best of Houzz 3 Years Running
features.description: Recognized for outstanding service quality on Houzz in 2021, 2022, and 2023 — voted by real homeowners.

features.title: Bilingual Service Available
features.description: Se Habla Espanol. Our bilingual team ensures clear communication with every family we serve in Northern New Jersey.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every project is unique, which is why we provide detailed, line-item proposals after your free consultation. You'll know exactly what you're paying for before we break ground.

guarantee.headline: The EverClear Promise
guarantee.description: We stand behind every pool we build, every surface we plaster, and every visit we make. If something isn't right, we come back and make it right — no excuses, no runaround. That's why 493 families have trusted us with a 4.8-star rating and why we've earned an A+ from the BBB.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a custom gunite pool?
faqs.answer: Most custom gunite pools take 8 to 12 weeks from groundbreaking to your first swim. We keep you updated at every stage so there are never surprises on timing.

faqs.question: What's the difference between gunite and vinyl pools?
faqs.answer: Gunite pools are built with a concrete and sand mixture that's incredibly durable and fully customizable in shape. Vinyl liner pools are more budget-friendly with a quicker install. We build both and can help you decide which fits your needs.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for pool construction?
faqs.answer: Yes, we work with several financing partners to offer flexible payment plans that make your dream pool affordable. Ask us about current options during your free consultation.

faqs.question: What does your weekly maintenance service include?
faqs.answer: Our valet maintenance covers water testing and chemical balancing, skimming and vacuuming, filter cleaning, equipment inspections, and a detailed report after every visit.

faqs.question: Do you serve areas outside Passaic County?
faqs.answer: Yes! While we're based in Paterson, we serve families throughout Northern New Jersey including Alpine, Wyckoff, Saddle River, Franklin Lakes, Clifton, Mendham, and surrounding communities.

testimonials.name: Terry G.
testimonials.text: Thomas and Justin came today to clean up after the pool's opening. They were fabulous — started work right away, were pleasant and professional, and my pool is absolutely clean. Great work!

testimonials.name: Verified Customer
testimonials.text: Our experience with EverClear has been outstanding since 2021. Their quality of work and customer service is exceptional, with a reliable and professional team that always delivers.

testimonials.name: Maintenance Client
testimonials.text: Eric and Charles are amazing — very friendly, helpful and professional. They ensure our pool is in great shape each week. Highly recommend their maintenance services.

contact.headline: Ready to Build Your Dream Pool?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure consultation with our team. We'll visit your property, discuss your vision, and show you what's possible.
benefits: Free on-site consultation and 3D design preview
Detailed written proposal with transparent pricing
Flexible scheduling — evenings and weekends available

footer.description: EverClear Pools & Spas is an award-winning pool contractor serving Paterson and Northern New Jersey since 2010. From custom construction to weekly maintenance, we help families make memories that last a lifetime.
footer.service_area: Serving Passaic County, Paterson, Alpine, Wyckoff, Saddle River, Franklin Lakes, Clifton, Mendham, Hewitt, and all of Northern New Jersey.
